final:
module RefModule(input clk, input D, input S, input CE, output reg Q);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (CE == 1'b1) begin
            if (S == 1'b1) begin
                Q <= 1'b1;
            end else begin
                Q <= D;
            end
        end
    end
endmodule
